mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_registration (user_id, activity_id, status, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{activityId}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT ar.registration_id, ar.user_id, ar.activity_id, ar.registration_time, ar.status, ar.remark, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, a.title, a.description, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.type FROM activity_registration ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ar.activity_id = a.activity_id WHERE ar.registration_id = #{registrationId}

SELECT ar.registration_id, ar.user_id, ar.activity_id, ar.registration_time, ar.status, ar.remark, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, a.title, a.description, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.type FROM activity_registration ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ar.activity_id = a.activity_id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ar.registration_time DESC

SELECT ar.registration_id, ar.user_id, ar.activity_id, ar.registration_time, ar.status, ar.remark, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, a.title, a.description, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.type FROM activity_registration ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ar.activity_id = a.activity_id WHERE ar.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY ar.registration_time DESC

SELECT ar.registration_id, ar.user_id, ar.activity_id, ar.registration_time, ar.status, ar.remark, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, a.title, a.description, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.type FROM activity_registration ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ar.activity_id = a.activity_id WHERE ar.activity_id = #{activityId} AND ar.status = #{status} ORDER BY ar.registration_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND status = #{status}

SELECT ar.registration_id, ar.user_id, ar.activity_id, ar.registration_time, ar.status, ar.remark, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, a.title, a.description, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.type FROM activity_registration ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ar.activity_id = a.activity_id ORDER BY ar.registration_time DESC

SELECT ar.registration_id, ar.user_id, ar.activity_id, ar.registration_time, ar.status, ar.remark, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, a.title, a.description, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.location, a.type FROM activity_registration ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ar.activity_id = a.activity_id WHERE ar.status = #{status} ORDER BY ar.registration_time DESC
